title: Prototype repobrief ask CLI
goal: Build a minimal read-only CLI path that produces a small task-conditioned context pack from existing snapshots and indices.

acceptance.assertion: repobrief ask or equivalent transitional CLI produces JSON and human-readable context-pack output.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Implementation uses existing read-only access/query surfaces and does not write snapshots.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Token budget affects selection size and is reported as a constraint, not quality proof.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Focused CLI smoke tests cover basic_repo_question and at least one stricter task profile.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #935: minimal read-only repobrief ask CLI producing JSON and human-readable context packs with budget reporting.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t005-cli: repobrief ask emits JSON and human-readable context-pack output; tests test_repobrief_ask_cli_emits_json_context_pack and test_repobrief_ask_cli_emits_human_context_pack.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t005-access-layer: build_ask_context_pack delegates to existing snapshot_status, resolve_required_reading_for_bundle and query_existing_index; no snapshot writes/refresh.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t005-smoke: test_repobrief_ask_cli_stricter_profile_smoke covers pr_review; basic_repo_question covered by JSON/text CLI tests.

checks: Lenskit PR #935 CI all green before merge
